recentTweets.text:
I’m urging the Senate to pass the Fix Our Forests Act.

Years of mismanagement have left our forests vulnerable to catastrophic wildfires that threaten lives, communities, and water supplies.

The House has done its job. Now it’s time for the Senate to act.

I just sent out the most recent edition of the Downing Dispatch! 

If you didn't get it direct to your inbox, you can catch up here 🔽
https://t.co/w8fwWrPISO

Montanans have led grizzly recovery efforts for decades. This is a commonsense step toward local management guided by science and conditions on the ground.

https://t.co/JBpDe6pVsK

This week on Downing Dispatch:

A major water infrastructure win for the Crow Tribe, action on the MMIP crisis, and meetings with tribal leaders and Montana FFA members.

Watch below 🔽 https://t.co/K3kY6QwXBg

Law-abiding Montanans should never end up on a watchlist for exercising their Second Amendment rights.

Proud to help pass the Protecting Privacy in Purchases Act to prevent banks and payment networks from creating a backdoor registry of lawful firearm and ammunition purchases. https://t.co/QngMVUuCWc

With temperatures rising, it is important to keep fire season top of mind.

Please follow this basic checklist and take steps now to protect your family, property, and livestock.

Stay safe. Stay prepared. https://t.co/Na9qjrwUZE

RT @NatResources: Another markup, another day of stewarding our natural resources and delivering for America’s rural communities 🇺🇸

Scroll…

Always encouraging to meet the future leaders of Montana agriculture.

Thank you to the FFA members who stopped by to discuss their priorities and the importance of supporting and educating the next generation of Montana farmers and ranchers. https://t.co/pdh3JvkRcA

Today in @NatResources, my Crow Tribe Water Rights Settlement Amendments Act passed out of committee.

This bipartisan bill gives the Crow Tribe more flexibility to build water infrastructure and continue work on the Crow Irrigation Project.

A strong step forward for the Crow https://t.co/Q5nxo42evv
RT @SteveDaines: Always great visiting with folks this week in DC at MT Coffee! @RepTroyDowning https://t.co/SHRTNQshDn
Great start to my day visiting with Montanans in D.C. at MT coffee. https://t.co/QbR0ti1Kv7

Montanans understand the importance of localized wildlife management.

This proposed rule is a commonsense step that gives states more flexibility to manage grizzly bear populations using science and conditions on the ground while maintaining federal protections.

Public safety

Housing affordability remains a major challenge for Montana families.

That is why I am proud that my Whole-Home Repairs Act was included in the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which became law this week.

The legislation creates HUD grants to help low- and moderate-income https://t.co/sHrVLa86V7
We need to bolster coordination between the BIA, FBI, and Tribal Law Enforcement and ensure they have the tools and resources needed to protect tribal members. https://t.co/B0pOP76Mne

I had a productive meeting with Waded Cruzado, President of the Association of Public and Land-grant Universities, to discuss the priorities facing public universities across MT and the country.

Thank you to President Cruzado and APLU for taking the time to meet with me. https://t.co/FfHx5yMuoU

Today in @NatResources, I questioned BIA Director Addington about the Missing and Murdered Indigenous Persons crisis in Montana.

I highlighted that while tribal communities make up roughly 7% of Montana’s population, they account for 26% of missing person cases in our state. https://t.co/Uah0Qmqd36
Fly-In Monday: Week-in-District recap and the session week ahead… https://t.co/zH2RdvJnxD

My NAHASDA bill has 48 cosponsors from both sides of the aisle. 

We are doing everything we can to encourage member dialogue, a markup, and floor votes to move forward bringing much needed relief to the housing crisis in Indian Country.

Senator Lindsey Graham devoted his life to serving our country, first in uniform and later in the United States Senate.

He was a strong voice for America and a steadfast patriot who never backed down from a fight.

Heather and I are praying for his family, friends, and all who
Another major bipartisan accomplishment from the House Financial Services Committee. Proud to see the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act become law today.

Today, the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act became law. A major win for American families and Montana communities.

Homeownership is a cornerstone of the American Dream, and this legislation helps make that dream more attainable by increasing housing supply, reducing barriers to

Glad to see continued investment in Montana and our workforce.

Amazon now employs more than 800 Montanans across six facilities in the Treasure State, and the new delivery station in Great Falls is another step forward for jobs and economic growth in our state.

Thank you for https://t.co/7WGMYdYZgN

It was a pleasure to attend the Janicki Industries groundbreaking in Great Falls today and join @GovGianforte in celebrating this major investment in Montana manufacturing.

This project will create 2000 good-paying jobs and will strengthen MT’s economy for years to come. https://t.co/4KoaTMyWSN

It was valuable to hear directly from local business leaders and community members at our Helena business roundtable.

Thank you to everyone who helped organize a productive discussion. I’m grateful for the ideas, feedback, and perspective from Montanans. https://t.co/bTLhCveODA

I had a great time touring the U.S. Bank Branch in Helena. We discussed market conditions in Montana and my support for the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. Thank you for having me! https://t.co/3qLZevOQw2

Great to host a productive conversation with Neel Kashkari, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis, and @BrownCSIMT at the Fed’s Helena branch.

We discussed economic development in Indian Country and how to expand opportunity across Montana.

Thank you to everyone

Montana farmers should have the right to repair their own equipment without unnecessary roadblocks.

Glad to see this settlement advance that principle and give producers more control over the tools they rely on every day.

This is a win for farmers, competition, and rural

Montana’s critical minerals industry helps America compete with global adversaries like China and Russia.

Glad to see this new critical mineral mill in Radersburg strengthen our supply chains, support good-paying jobs, and bolster our national security.

Montana is leading the

Trump Accounts are Live! 

Every generation deserves a chance to pursue the American Dream, and Trump Accounts will invest in Montana’s children from day one, giving them a stronger foundation with a stake in our country's future. These accounts give $1,000 to every American

Nothing in the history of humanity, no rules, no laws, no systems of man have done more to improve the human condition than free market capitalism and the type of government we have in the United States of America 🇺🇸 

https://t.co/hY51zed0vo
🇺🇸🇺🇸 https://t.co/Vu11LJN38N

Happy fourth of July, Montana! As the USA turns 250, we celebrate the greatest nation ever built. Have a happy and safe day! 

God bless Montana. God bless America! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/iDtX8wnMdb

Last night, Montanans gathered in Billings for the Wall That Heals ceremony.

This traveling replica of the Vietnam Veterans Memorial is a powerful reminder of the sacrifice of our Vietnam veterans and the healing that still continues.

Grateful to everyone who helped bring it to https://t.co/GElzgx31NY

Lots of fun visiting the Montana booth at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall.

Great to talk with educators from Lambert and Shepherd and see a little piece of Montana represented right in the heart of our nation’s capital.

Nobody does it better than the Treasure https://t.co/t7jROldOrp

The Appropriations Committee has now advanced 12 bipartisan bills.

We are getting back to regular order in the House and doing the work the American people sent us here to do.

Now it’s time to get these bills through the Senate and fulfill our promises. https://t.co/nA4Xj2OylK

Today in @FinancialCmte, I reflected on my time as Montana’s Securities Regulator and the need to reform the SEC.

I’m proud to cosponsor H.R. 9329 to bring more transparency, accountability, and discipline to an agency that too often rushed rulemaking and underestimated costs.

Last week, @NatResources advanced the Great American Outdoors Act 250.

Montana’s public lands are central to our way of life. They support local jobs and strengthen gateway communities.

This bill improves access and helps preserve these treasured places for future generations.

Fly-in Monday: Busy week ahead in Washington as we work to pass the NDAA, support our military, and fund the Sentinel project at Malmstrom.

Montana plays a critical role in our national defense, and I’ll keep fighting to make sure our state has the resources needed to carry out https://t.co/uAeTE3sOc0

Behind the scenes with Congressman Downing:

Leadership starts with turning “me” into “we.”

Service taught me that trust is built by listening first and putting the mission ahead of yourself. https://t.co/Olsa3swDDZ

This is a new Bolshevik revolution dressed up for the modern age.

History has shown us where radical socialism leads. The American people will reject it because they still believe in the ideals of freedom. https://t.co/Dap1oe6UPE

I had the honor of welcoming MT-02’s Congressional Art Challenge winner Libby to the Capitol.

Her artwork will hang in the Capitol tunnel for the next year. It was a privilege to meet such a talented young artist from Montana.

Congratulations, Libby. We are proud of you! https://t.co/HlAQWkggFT

This week on Downing Dispatch: the House passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes my Whole-Home Repairs Act.

I also spoke on Reconciliation 3.0 and questioned witnesses on financial innovation.

I’ll keep working to lower costs and make sure Montana’s voice is https://t.co/Tlqgd45r9Z

Productive meeting with the Montana Nurses Association yesterday.

I’m grateful for the work nurses do every day for Montana families and appreciated the chance to hear their priorities firsthand. https://t.co/f41ZIPjjZP

Today marks 150 years since the Battle of the Little Bighorn.

We remember the soldiers and warriors who fought there and recognize the tribal nations whose history is forever tied to this land.

May we honor its legacy with respect and reflection. https://t.co/IkIU8wIfNm

States need the ability to tackle Medicare Advantage fraud and abuse head on.

That is why I introduced the PARTNERS Act to give states more authority to enforce existing federal standards and protect seniors.

Accountability should not stop at Washington’s doorstep. https://t.co/JDFwfUpiuk

Great conversation with @SecRollins about the issues facing Montana agriculture.

We discussed support for our grain growers, challenges facing sugar beet farmers, and the need to protect America’s cattle herd from New World screwworm. https://t.co/C40Dn0hh0h

I applaud @TheJusticeDept for busting up $6.5 billion in alleged Medicare and Medicaid fraud.

Fraudsters used taxpayer dollars on sports cars and even built foreign luxury resorts while abusing programs meant to help patients.

Glad to see @FBIDirectorKash and @DAGToddBlanche https://t.co/CypqOrCXHO

Today in the @FinancialCmte, I questioned witnesses on how passive investing is changing our capital markets.

Active investors play an important role in price discovery and helping companies access public markets.

We need strong markets that work for everyday investors and

Today, I met with members of the National Council of Insurance Legislators to discuss issues impacting insurance markets and consumers.

States play an important role in protecting consumers and keeping insurance markets strong. I appreciated the productive conversation. https://t.co/iPeNtiqkRT

Today marks four years since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.

As the son of a single mother who chose life at a young age, I am forever grateful for her courage, sacrifice, and unwavering love.

Today, and every day, may we be reminded to stand for the sanctity of life

Today in the @FinancialCmte, I questioned witnesses on how state regulators can help support innovation in payments and financial services.

As Montana’s former securities and insurance regulator, I know states play an important role in protecting consumers while allowing new https://t.co/S2buGpRYnA

I was proud to speak today on the importance of a Reconciliation 3.0.

Montana families deserve lower costs and a healthcare system that works for them.

Let’s get it done. https://t.co/Vg8EwNEdwP

The House just passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. ✅

This is a big step toward expanding housing opportunities for Montana families.

Proud to help get this done.

Flew back to Washington for a busy week, and the House just passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. ✅

This bill includes my Whole-Home Repairs Act and takes important steps to expand housing opportunities for Montana families.

Now, let’s get it to the President’s desk. https://t.co/qBqqROdIXG

PILT funding is critical for Montana counties with large amounts of federal land.

These payments help support roads, law enforcement, and emergency services in communities that shoulder real costs because of the federal government’s footprint.

Glad to see over $50 million in

Today, I spoke at the @BPC_Bipartisan’s Housing Summit about the need to expand housing opportunities in Montana and nationwide.

Families need more affordable options, fewer barriers to construction, and policies that help communities grow.

Quantum technology will shape the future of our economy and national security.

I support @POTUS efforts to keep America leading in quantum innovation and ensure we stay ahead of our adversaries in the technologies that will define the next generation.

Montana, and our emerging

Homeownership is part of the American Dream, and that includes families in tribal communities.

Proud to have introduced the bipartisan NAHASDA Modernization Act to give tribes long-term certainty and more flexibility to meet local housing needs.

I’ll keep fighting to get it

Montana coal supports good-paying jobs across our state, and provides reliable energy when our country needs it most. I’ll keep fighting to protect this critical industry. https://t.co/fsbc59RkeD
